title: galium parisiense subsp. euparisiense
intro: Galium parisiense subsp. euparisiense, also known as the Paris milkwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have medicinal properties. The health benefits of Galium parisiense subsp. euparisiense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or ointments that can be applied topically or taken orally.
